scope_note: MiscMCPRadar treats the awesome-mcp-korea section as a T4 community directory seed. Repository metadata, location/address data handling, and security context remain separate enrichment layers until archived, license, and advisory fields are collected.

operational_candidates.name: GitHub repository metadata enrichment
operational_candidates.activation_gate: rate-limit handling, repository canonicalization, and archived/license mapping

operational_candidates.name: MCP registry cross-check
operational_candidates.activation_gate: registry API availability and canonical package mapping

operational_candidates.name: GitHub security advisory cross-check
operational_candidates.activation_gate: advisory API coverage and false positive handling
